rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core design and constructs: both examine constrained creative tasks and explicitly manipulate step-by-step instructions and known target outcomes. The citing note’s Study 2 tests the same constraint dimensions (instructions vs target outcome) and reports downstream creativity effects, suggesting the 2007 paper is a likely conceptual/method source rather than a passing mention. With this close overlap, it is not safe to drop based on mention-only triage.
